title: always check document model schema before calling addActions
content:
# always check document model schema before calling addActions

Before dispatching any actions via `addActions`, always call `getDocumentModelSchema` to understand the input requirements:

```
mcp__reactor-mcp__getDocumentModelSchema({ type: "powerhouse/document-model" })
```

This reveals required fields (like `id` or `scope`), valid enum values, and input shapes. Without this step, actions frequently fail due to missing or malformed parameters.

This applies to all document types — document models, editors, apps, and drives. Since [[document model changes require both MCP update and src file update]], understanding the schema prevents wasted round trips on both sides.

---

Topics:
- [[mcp workflows]]
description: Using getDocumentModelSchema first prevents failed calls by ensuring required parameters and input shapes are known
